B.name: Evelyn Sanchez
B.role: Executive Assistant to Superintendent / Board Secretary

llmResponse.agendaChanges: No changes to the agenda were made. The recording begins at the Reconvene to Open Session (Section 4); the Closed Session (Section 3) and earlier items are not captured in the transcript. The Roll Call, Report Out on Closed Session, Welcome, Changes to the Agenda, and Approval of the Agenda all occur in rapid succession at the start of the recording. The public hearing (Section 12) and its associated action item (Resolution No. 3, Section 14) were handled in the order listed on the agenda. Section 13 consent items were approved as a bundle. Sections 15 through 20 followed in order.

items.title: Call to Order
Roll Call (Open Session)
Public Comment on Closed Session Items Only
Closed Session - 6:30 PM
Reconvene to Open Session / Roll Call / Report Out on Closed Session
Welcome
Changes to the Agenda
Approval of the Agenda
Public Comment
Approval of the Bond Program Consent Items
Bond Program Action Items
Discussion Items
Discussion of Parcel Tax Survey Findings and Recommended Next Steps

publicComments.name: Jessica Shade
publicComments.summary: Expressed strong parent support for the parcel tax, praised the equity of the square-footage model, noted polls are close to the two-thirds threshold and called for all-hands-on-deck community involvement.

publicComments.name: Carlo Contavalli
publicComments.summary: Argued that the poll results show a good chance of passage and urged the board to put the measure on the ballot, warning that inaction would only worsen the district's funding situation.

publicComments.name: Brandon Matthews
publicComments.summary: Expressed wholehearted support for the parcel tax on behalf of Unidos/Adelante Selby PTO, highlighting the equitable and progressive nature of the square-footage structure and the school's limited fundraising capacity.
